text:
The first scene feels strangely still – almost clinical, regular lines in architecture, wide open spaces, fire hose and emergency signs. I feel like a lone observer in the quiet, as if waiting for something to happen, aware of my own presence in this almost-empty environment.

The second scene draws my curiosity. Surrounded by displays about innovation and research, vibrant colors and thought-provoking texts, I feel a rush of inquisitive energy. The words on the wall and flickering screens invite me to question, reflect, and perhaps challenge, and the contrast to the earlier stillness is striking. It feels as if ideas are buzzing in the air here, and I am part of some evolving conversation about humanity and technology.
